business.name: Habibi Slavic and Arabic Food & Drink

archetype.rationale: Unusual Slavic–Arabic fusion, neon patio, tableside shashlik, and hand-painted murals — the visit is the product.

runner_up_rejected.name: LOCAL TRUST
runner_up_rejected.reason: Limited scraped review text; lead with atmosphere and menu proof instead.

category.value: Halal Slavic and Arabic sit-down restaurant
category.evidence: Business name, Arabic halal tagline on Maps, menu board and dish photos.

price_level.evidence: Menu board prices from 60,000₫ (khinkali) to 280,000₫ (lamb shashlik).

customer_type.value: Tourists and expats on An Thượng 26, Đà Nẵng
customer_type.evidence: Address in Ngũ Hành Sơn dining district.

main_selling_point.value: Two cuisines, one room — Georgian dumplings and Arabic mezze on the same table.
main_selling_point.evidence: Menu categories and mural decor spanning Slavic and Arabic themes.

competitive_advantage.value: Rare Slavic–Arabic combination with a lit patio and tableside shashlik service.
competitive_advantage.evidence: Fusion menu, photo-2 shashlik service, photo-22 and photo-6 murals.

section_order.purpose: Name the fusion and show the neon storefront — not a stock overlay hero.
Full menu with prices from the printed board plus photo-confirmed dishes.
Murals, patio, and room — curated, not a 23-image dump.

design_direction.tone: Sensory and direct — name the dishes, the neon, the skewer pulled tableside.

typography.body: Source Sans 3 — readable menu on mobile

design_direction.color: Red and gold from the Habibi sign; warm cream surfaces; dark wood text — no purple gradient blobs.
design_direction.layout_rhythm: Asymmetric hero → categorized menu → fusion story → dish gallery → tight atmosphere → visit band.
design_direction.imagery_priority: Exterior neon (photo-21), murals (photo-22, photo-6), owner dish photography.
do_not: Full-bleed purple patio hero with centered white text
Google Maps meta copy in FAQs
Invented prices for items not on the menu board

gaps: Full weekly opening hours — only closing time confirmed
Additional menu board pages beyond page one
